security.csp: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420

bundle.longDescription: Locket is a local-first secrets control plane for development environments.
